Learners are beings which use [[Servitors]]. They are thought to all belong to the animal clade [[bilateria]], however many members of that clade are not learners. It is unclear whether the common ancestor was a learner. [[Immanuelle]] thinks it was, and wrote that in the [[Gaiad]].

Learners are capable of learning from their environments, and are divided into two main categories [[Asynthesizers]] and [[Sapients]] based on whether they also use [[Desire synthesis]]
[[Category:Learners]]
[[sn:Learners]][[Category:Organisms]]
[[sn:Learners]][[Category:Great chain of being]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Learners]]
[[Category:Pages]]
